msg: Full AI audit completed — website, SEO, reputation, brand, conversion. Score: 38/100. Roadmap written.
Created audit.md — 9 sections, full growth roadmap with 4 phases
Created brief.md — client onboarded, key USPs and contact details documented
proposal.html skapad — 6 delar, fullständig offert på svenska med prissättning i 3 paket
Client onboarded — Yalo Yoga (Artemis). Sustainable cork yoga brand, Sweden.
AI audit completed — Overall score 40/100. Key gaps: TikTok absent, permanent discounting, no digital products.
Growth proposal published — 9 sections covering app, courses, clothing, content creation & full execution plan. 3 pricing tiers: Seed €2,900 / Growth €7,900 / Empire €18,900.
Client onboarded — Vivanord (f.d. NordVital). Reseller for Medvital Sverige AB: kosttillskott på prenumeration, Sweden + Spanish-speaking audience.
Full site built (SV + ES): home, products, Hälsoklubben contest funnel, invoice-based checkout, admin back office with Supabase integration.
Meta launch plan written and policy-reviewed — 3 campaigns, 8 ads (SV+ES), contest prize raised to 10 000 kr (funded by Medvital).
Domain vivanord.se purchased. Client presentation published to GitHub Pages.
